ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property listing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the listing was added or updated */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft_living" INTEGER /* Square footage of the living area */,
  "sqft_lot" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "waterfront" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a waterfront */,
  "view" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a view */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the property */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the property */,
  "sqft_above" INTEGER /* Square footage of the space above ground */,
  "sqft_basement" INTEGER /* Square footage of the basement */,
  "yr_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "yr_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was renovated */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "sqft_living15" INTEGER /* Square footage of the living area as of 2015 */,
  "sqft_lot15" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot as of 2015 */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., single-family, apartment, condo) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Listing price of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, sold, under contract) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who listed the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed text description of the property */,
  "photos" TEXT /* References to property photos */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of additional features or amenities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the property listing was updated */,
  "selling_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who sold the property (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_selling_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("selling_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, broker, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the agent */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the agent */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the broker */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the broker */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the broker */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the broker */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate of the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brokers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the administrator */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the administrator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property history entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the property */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date and time the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
